# Test data

Most XML files in this directory are sourced from [nfelib](https://github.com/akretion/nfelib),
Copyright (c) 2017 Raphaël Valyi - Akretion LTDA, and are used under the MIT
License. See [`LICENSE.nfelib`](./LICENSE.nfelib) for the full license text.

Some files are synthetic fixtures created for this repository. Those fixtures
use fake access keys, CNPJ values, and protocol numbers while preserving the
public schema shape needed by tests.
